deck.title: Understanding Roses
deck.outline:
1. Understanding Roses - statement
2. The Science and Symbolism of Roses - Roses are complex plants with specific growth patterns and deep historical significance in art and literature.
3. Conclusion: The Enduring Legacy of Roses - Roses are more than flowers; they are symbols of love, resilience, and artistic expression.
